channel.title: Spiced Coffee on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Spiced Coffee on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: Café de Olla Recipe (Traditional Mexican Spiced Coffee)
item.description: Learn how to make authentic café de olla at home — traditional Mexican spiced coffee brewed with piloncillo, cinnamon, and bold coffee. Stovetop, French press, and espresso machine versions included.
